EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IMapServer

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to members for a MapService.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("C1EE7009-1027-4F5A-89AE-0E2CEC6FCEF4")]
public interface IMapServer

Properties

DefaultMapName

Name of the document's active map (data frame).

string DefaultMapName { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

DocumentInfo

A set of name-value pairs for properties set for the map document (mxd only). These properties are string values set in the map document's Map Properties dialog and include: Title, Subject, Author, Category, Keywords and Comments.

IPropertySet DocumentInfo { get; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

FilePath

The map document path.

string FilePath { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

MapCount

The number of maps (data frames) in the document.

int MapCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MapName[int]

Name of the map (data frame) as indicated by the index. The first beginning with 0.

string MapName[int Index] { get; }

Parameters

Index int

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

PhysicalCacheDirectory

The physical directory for cache files.

string PhysicalCacheDirectory { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

PhysicalOutputDirectory

The physical directory for output files.

string PhysicalOutputDirectory { get; }

Property Value

string

GetServerInfo(string)

Returns information about a map (data frame).

IMapServerInfo GetServerInfo(string MapName)

Parameters

MapName string

Returns

IMapServerInfo

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetSupportedImageReturnTypes()

The supported image return types for the map server. A value of esriImageReturnMimeData means that only MIME data is supported. Otherwise, either MIME data or URLs are supported.

esriImageReturnType GetSupportedImageReturnTypes()

Returns

esriImageReturnType

Examples

Sample Snippet
